untranslatable_reason: Signal references an external proxy index (DJTA) used to trade a different target market (S&P 500). The allowed indicator set contains only price/technical indicators for a single instrument. Cross-market signal generation with a reference index proxy cannot be expressed in the single-instrument constraint. Additionally, the requirement to track 'bars below lower band' (confirmation_bars >= 2) requires state tracking across multiple bars, which is not supported by the condition schema.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using Bollinger Bands as a volatility band proxy (bb_lower, bb_upper with bb_middle as sma_20 and bandwidth ~4%), and price_pos_20 to approximate extreme deviation. However, the core logic of using an external correlated index (DJTA) to generate signals in another market (S&P 500) cannot be faithfully represented without cross-market data access. The signal is fundamentally untranslatable in this framework.
